author: Greg / Codex AutoResearch
name: Non-record: state-space hybrid with attention anchors
blurb: Fixed-step local sign-of-life on the standard scorer path. Layout AASSSASSS with exact attention anchors, S4D-style state-space blocks from a compile-friendly architecture family, and an export policy that keeps ssm.* tensors in float16 while the kept run itself uses ENABLE_TORCH_COMPILE=0.
